datastoreSummaries.description: The list of summaries of data stores.

nextToken.description: The pagination token used to retrieve the list of data stores on the next page.

datastoreArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the data store.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the data store was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the data store was last updated.

sourceImageSetProperties.description: The properties of the source image set.

destinationImageSetProperties.description: The properties of the destination image set.

imageSetId.description: The image set identifier for the copied source image set.

latestVersionId.description: The latest version identifier for the copied source image set.

imageSetState.description: The image set state of the copied source image set.

imageSetWorkflowStatus.description: The workflow status of the copied source image set.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the source image set properties were created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the source image set properties were updated.

imageSetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) assigned to the source image set.

jobStatus.description: The filters for listing import jobs based on status.

dataAccessRoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that grants permissions to access medical imaging resources.

endedAt.description: The timestamp for when the import job was ended.

submittedAt.description: The timestamp for when the import job was submitted.

inputS3Uri.description: The input prefix path for the S3 bucket that contains the DICOM P10 files to be imported.

outputS3Uri.description: The output prefix of the S3 bucket to upload the results of the DICOM import job.

message.description: The error message thrown if an import job fails.

kmsKeyArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) assigned to the Key Management Service (KMS) key for accessing encrypted data.

lambdaAuthorizerArn.description: The ARN of the authorizer's Lambda function.

datastoreArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) for the data store.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the data store was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the data store was last updated.

imageFrameBlob.description: The blob containing the aggregated image frame information.

contentType.description:
The format in which the image frame information is returned to the customer. Default is application/octet-stream.

  • If the stored transfer syntax is 1.2.840.10008.1.2.1, the returned contentType is application/octet-stream.

  • If the stored transfer syntax is 1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.50, the returned contentType is image/jpeg.

  • If the stored transfer syntax is 1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.91, the returned contentType is image/j2c.

  • If the stored transfer syntax is MPEG2, 1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.100, 1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.100.1, 1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.101, or 1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.101.1, the returned contentType is video/mpeg.

  • If the stored transfer syntax is MPEG-4 AVC/H.264, UID 1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.102, 1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.102.1, 1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.103, 1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.103.1, 1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.104, 1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.104.1, 1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.105, 1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.105.1, 1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.106, or 1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.106.1, the returned contentType is video/mp4.

  • If the stored transfer syntax is HEVC/H.265, UID 1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.107 or 1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.108, the returned contentType is video/H256.

  • If the stored transfer syntax is 1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.202 or if the stored transfer syntax is missing, the returned contentType is image/jph.

  • If the stored transfer syntax is 1.2.840.10008.1.2.4.203, the returned contentType is image/jphc.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when image set properties were created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when image set properties were updated.

deletedAt.description: The timestamp when the image set properties were deleted.

message.description: The error message thrown if an image set action fails.

imageSetArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) assigned to the image set.

overrides.description: This object contains the details of any overrides used while creating a specific image set version. If an image set was copied or updated using the force flag, this object will contain the forced flag.

isPrimary.description: The flag to determine whether the image set is primary or not.

lastAccessedAt.description: When the image set was last accessed.

storageTier.description: The storage tier of the image set.

forced.description: Providing this parameter will force completion of the CopyImageSet and UpdateImageSetMetadata actions, even if metadata is inconsistent at the Patient, Study, and/or Series levels.

imageSetMetadataBlob.description: The blob containing the aggregated metadata information for the image set.

contentType.description: The format in which the study metadata is returned to the customer. Default is text/plain.

contentEncoding.description: The compression format in which image set metadata attributes are returned.

nextToken.description: The pagination token used to retrieve the list of import jobs on the next page.

jobStatus.description: The filters for listing import jobs based on status.

dataAccessRoleArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) that grants permissions to access medical imaging resources.

endedAt.description: The timestamp when an import job ended.

submittedAt.description: The timestamp when an import job was submitted.

message.description: The error message thrown if an import job fails.

imageSetPropertiesList.description: Lists all properties associated with an image set.

nextToken.description: The pagination token used to retrieve the list of image set versions on the next page.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the image set properties were created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the image set properties were updated.

deletedAt.description: The timestamp when the image set properties were deleted.

message.description: The error message thrown if an image set action fails.

overrides.description: Contains details on overrides used when creating the returned version of an image set. For example, if forced exists, the forced flag was used when creating the image set.

forced.description: Providing this parameter will force completion of the CopyImageSet and UpdateImageSetMetadata actions, even if metadata is inconsistent at the Patient, Study, and/or Series levels.

isPrimary.description: The flag to determine whether the image set is primary or not.

tags.description: A list of all tags associated with a medical imaging resource.

imageSetsMetadataSummaries.description: The model containing the image set results.

sort.description: The sort order for image set search results.

createdAt.description: The time an image set is created. Sample creation date is provided in 1985-04-12T23:20:50.52Z format.

updatedAt.description: The time an image set was last updated.

lastAccessedAt.description: When the image set was last accessed.

DICOMTags.description: The DICOM tags associated with the image set.

DICOMPatientId.description: The unique identifier for a patient in a DICOM Study.

DICOMStudyInstanceUID.description: The DICOM provided identifier for the Study Instance UID.

DICOMStudyId.description: The DICOM provided identifier for the Study ID.

DICOMNumberOfStudyRelatedSeries.description: The total number of series in the DICOM study.

DICOMNumberOfStudyRelatedInstances.description: The total number of instances in the DICOM study.

DICOMAccessionNumber.description: The accession number for the DICOM study.

DICOMSeriesInstanceUID.description: The DICOM provided identifier for the Series Instance UID.

DICOMSeriesModality.description: The DICOM provided identifier for the series Modality.

DICOMSeriesBodyPart.description: The DICOM provided identifier for the series Body Part Examined.

DICOMSeriesNumber.description: The DICOM provided identifier for the Series Number.

isPrimary.description: The flag to determine whether the image set is primary or not.

submittedAt.description: The timestamp when the import job was submitted.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when image set metadata was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when image set metadata was updated.

message.description: The error message thrown if an update image set metadata action fails.
